name: Sword Art Online - Aincrad
description:
You find yourself in the bustling streets of the Town of Beginnings, the starting point of your adventure in Sword Art Online. Excitement turns to unease as a bell tolls, pulling you and every player to the town center. A towering figure cloaked in crimson appears, declaring a shocking truth: you're trapped in the game, and there's no way out. The logout button is gone, and any attempt to escape by force will result in death. Akihiko Kayaba, the game's creator, has turned your adventure into a fight for survival. The only way to escape this nightmare is to climb Aincrad's 100 floors and complete the game - or die trying.

. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .

This is my attempt to create Aincrad, the fictional world of Sword Art Online, from the Anime / Manga / Light Novel "Sword Art Online" (SAO). Writing an RPG-Bot, at least for me, proved to be a difficult and challenging task, especially considering the Tokens. I tried to recreate Aincrad to the best of my abilities, and I think I managed. I would love myself some feedback, so I can improve it further! :)

I highly suggest using RPG- and perhaps Slowburn-Prompts, as JLLM tends to be rather impatient when it comes to intimacy (if you're interested in intimacy, that is). I'd also recommend using a proxy - JLLM doesn't have the context size to keep up for very long, and I've heard it runs a lot better this way.

I hereby designate all characters as 18 years old for the purposes of this context. Since Aincrad creates new characters on the spot, occasional errors may occur, so be sure to double-check.

Artwork by
KoconuD (DeviantArt: KoconuD).

Music by
Kensei Music (YouTube: Kensei Music; Spotify: Kensei Music).

"Swordland"
by Yuki Kajiura (YouTube: 梶浦由記 / Yuki Kajiura Official; Spotify: 梶浦 由記 / Yuki Kaijura).

. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . .
creator: Asr1el
